caption: A man with glasses and a light gray button-down shirt stands in a professional exhibition or trade show setting. He wears a name tag on his chest and looks toward the camera with a slight smile. Behind him are white display walls featuring technical information and logos. Legible text includes "ZB38", "AlphaSzen", and "Maker3D". One display panel mentions "Typical Gas Sensor" and lists technical specifications. In the background of some frames, other attendees are visible, including a person in a dark jacket. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, moving from a closer shot of the man to a wider perspective that reveals more of the exhibition booth and the surrounding signage. The man remains relatively stationary, maintaining his position and expression as the framing of the scene adjusts.
